story.title: Our Mission
story.content: We know how hard it can be to find the right game when you want to play with friends. GamePick was created to solve that problem - helping gamers discover multiplayer experiences that match their group size, preferred genres, and available time.

commitment.title: For Gamers, By Gamers
commitment.content: Our team consists of passionate gamers who understand what makes multiplayer experiences memorable. We personally test and review every game we recommend, ensuring quality recommendations every time.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a game suggestion or need help finding the perfect match? We'd love to hear from you!
